data.content: Audit complete: all 6 skill files (planning.md, plan_review.md, implementation.md, implementation_review.md, shipment.md, shipment_review.md) already have --add-handoff-capsule with full agent metadata (--handoff-agentname, --handoff-model, --handoff-version, --handoff-datetime, --handoff-username) on every path (success, failure, deferral, rejection). This was addressed in commit b336ace. 22 handoff capsule instances across all files confirmed.
